The '''RQ 550C ''Dart''''' was a small [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] used by the [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|champ]] [[Navior|"Bullseye" Navior]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Dart'' Podracer and its [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] were originally created for the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The Podracer made it as far as the film's animatic stages, which are view-able on the [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD]] special features of ''The Phantom Menace''.<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}} [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD special features]]</ref>
